panels.title: Service Dependency Graph
panels.description: Visualizes the call graph between services with edge metrics. Identify critical paths and single points of failure in the service mesh.

panels.title: External Dependencies
panels.description: Lists outbound calls to hosts outside the service mesh. Watch for high error rates or latency on external APIs that may degrade your services.

panels.title: Client vs Server Latency (p95)
panels.description: Compares p95 latency measured at the client span versus the server span. A large gap indicates network overhead or queuing between services.
